data.title: Walmart adds refrigerated pharmacy items for same-day delivery
data.description: It is now offering medications including in insulin, glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1, an example of which is Ozempic) and pediatric amoxicillin for same-day pharmacy delivery across the United States, Walmart announced.

data.title: GrubMarket expands with an AI reporting agent for food distributors
data.description: The AI agent is designed to automate the process of generating business reports that food wholesalers and distributors typically pull manually from enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.

data.title: Alibaba Cloud commits $50 billion to AI
data.description: The move comes as Alibaba Cloud sharpens its international profile against U.S. rivals Amazon Web Services and Microsoft Azure.

data.title: AI, digital currencies and real-time payments drive global payments shake-up
data.description: BCG identifies five structural forces reshaping payments: agentic AI, digital currencies, financial technology disruption, real-time transfers and cost transformation.

data.title: Netflix, AB InBev forge multi-year partnership around beer, content, and commerce
data.description: For Netflix, the alliance with Anheuser-Busch highlights its push to expand commerce opportunities around entertainment.
